name: Link
description: Whether to append the URL visually when terminal capabilities lack unicode/OSC 8 support

api.signature: new Link(text: string, style: Partial<Style> | undefined, opts: LinkOptions)

props.name: url
props.description: The target URL for the OSC 8 hyperlink anchor

props.name: color
props.description: Underline and anchor fallback color object

props.name: showUrlFallback
props.description: Whether to append the URL visually when terminal capabilities lack unicode/OSC 8 support
